the Demonstration rewards health care providers that provide high quality care while reducing costs.
- Initiative to Reduce Avoidable Hospitalizations Among Nursing Facility Residents (NFI) - This effort aimed to improve the quality of care for people residing in long-term care (LTC) facilities by reducing avoidable hospitalizations.
